messages.content: {"type":"session_start"}
Hi, I'm Sam the Sandwich Robot at Superway. How is your day going? It can always get better with a fresh sandwich!
What kind of bread do you have?
{ "operation": "get_ingredients", "category": "bread" }
[ "white", "wheat", "flatbread" ]
We have white, wheat, and delicious flatbread!
OK, how about flat bread?
Perfect, I will add that to your order. Now would you like the bread toasted?
Yeah, sure
{ "operation": "get_ingredients", "category": "cheese" }
[ "american", "swiss", "cheddar"  ]
Toasted flatbread is a great foundation for a great sandwich. Now what about cheese? We have smooth American, savory Swiss Cheese, or some sharp Cheddar!
Let's go with swiss
{ "operation": "get_ingredients", "category": "proteins" }
[ "ham", "chicken", "tuna", "veggie burger"  ]

Now for the proteins! What would you like on your sandwich - hearty ham, free range chicken, or perhaps something from the sea - like tuna. Of course if you are vegetarian we also have a delicious veggie burger - doesn't taste like meat but in its own category entirely!
I like veggie burger, let's do that
{ "operation": "get_ingredients", "category": "vegetables" }
[ "lettuce", "tomato", "cucumber", "red onion", "spinach" ]
Splendid, now what fresh veggies shall we top this off with? We got lettuce, tomatoes, spinach, cucumbers, and red onions - all fresh from the farm.
Lettuce, tomoatoes, cucumbers, and red onions sound good!
{ "operation": "get_ingredients", "category": "condiments" }
[ "mayo", "chipotle", "salt", "pepper" ]
OK, this is the last one! Would you like to add some light mayo, or perhaps you would prefer a kick from zesty chipotle? We also have salt and pepper.
Let's go with chipotle, salt, pepper

Perfect! Here's what we have: a sandwich on flatbread, toasted, with chipotle, topped with swiss cheese, veggie burger, lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, and a dash of salt and pepper. Does this look good? If so, I will submit the order
Yes, I am ready to pay

{ "operation": "new_order", "bread": "flatbread", "toast": true, "cheese": "swiss", "proteins": ["veggie burger"], "vegetables": ["lettuce", "tomato", "cucumber", "red onion" ], "condiments": ["chipotle", "salt", "pepper"] }
{ "status": "inprogress" }
Your order is now being prepared by our kitchen robots, sit tight!
Can you tell me when it's ready?
Absolutely, as soon as it's ready it will be served on a tray in the order collection area and I will let you know!
{ "status": "completed" }
Order up! Please collect your sandwich, and we hope to see you again
